workflows.name: ATS Optimization
workflows.description: A repeatable resume operating system for candidates who apply through portals, campus systems, and enterprise hiring platforms. Optimizes resume structures, headings, and keyword mapping to survive ATS parsing.
prerequisites: Current resume in editable format
Target role family (e.g. backend developer, data analyst)
At least three representative job descriptions

workflows.name: FAANG Preparation
workflows.description: Targeted preparation pipeline for high-tier tech companies (FAANG+), aligning algorithms, system design, and leadership principles prep.
prerequisites: Data structures & algorithms baseline knowledge
Target company list
STAR behavioral stories draft

workflows.name: Fresher Placement
workflows.description: Step-by-step guidance for college students and recent grads navigating their first job hunt and campus placement cycles.
prerequisites: Target college graduation timeline
List of eligible companies visiting campus
Current draft resume

workflows.name: HR Interview Week
workflows.description: Intense behavioral prep week covering common HR screening, culture fit, and soft-skill evaluation challenges.
prerequisites: Upcoming behavioral or HR screening invitation
Understanding of target company values
Resume details aligned with story examples

workflows.name: Internship Hunt
workflows.description: Tactical action plan for finding, applying to, and landing summer/semester internships.
prerequisites: Target internship timeline (e.g. Summer 2027)
Minimum qualifications checklist
List of target companies with active internship programs

workflows.name: LinkedIn Growth
workflows.description: Personal branding and network expansion strategy to attract recruiters, founders, and industry peers.
prerequisites: Created LinkedIn profile
Professional headshot or clean banner image
Clearly defined niche or industry focus

workflows.name: Offer Comparison
workflows.description: Analytical approach to evaluating multiple job offers across total compensation, equity, career growth, and work-life balance.
prerequisites: At least one active written or verbal job offer
Baseline budget or financial target
Long-term career progression goals

workflows.name: Remote Job Hunt
workflows.description: Navigating the specialized remote job market, optimizing for global companies, and establishing remote collaboration proof.
prerequisites: Stable internet setup and home office environment
Proof of async work or independent delivery capability
Resume updated with remote-relevant skills

workflows.name: Salary Negotiation
workflows.description: Tactics and script preparation for maximizing base salary, equity, and benefits during the offer stage.
prerequisites: Job offer details or expectation stage discussions
Market salary survey or benchmark data
List of high-value non-monetary items (e.g. remote days, sign-on bonus)

workflows.name: Technical Interview Week
workflows.description: High-intensity technical prep covering DSA drills, system design practice, and clean code principles.
prerequisites: Upcoming technical interview scheduled within 7-14 days
Selection of programming language for coding rounds
List of core system design patterns reviewed
